log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Warforged — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:8+3=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:15+-2=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Ogre attacks Warforged — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:18+6=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Warforged — Bardic Musician HP: 51/67
